channel.title: The Athletic - Ohio State Buckeyes (College Football)
channel.description: Ohio State Buckeyes college football news from The Athletic (NYTimes).

item.title: How many games will Ohio State win? Who will take home awards? Our early 2026 predictions
item.description: The 2026 football season is less than three months away. Here are some early predictions from our Ohio State expert.

item.title: My favorite offseason personnel move for every Power 4 college football team
item.description: Will the addition of Drew Mestemaker make Oklahoma State a contender in the Big 12? How much will Cam Coleman impact Texas' offense?

item.title: Brendan Sorsby's injunction raises the question: Can the NCAA enforce anything anymore?
item.description: Could the College Football Playoff committee or the Big 12 do something about the Sorsby situation?

item.title: Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: Softball season is over. I’m fully focused on football. At least until I leave on vacation next week. Leave your questions here. Please include your city.

item.title: Will Michigan-Ohio State follow the Duke-UNC model? Your rivalry questions, answered
item.description: Our Michigan and OSU experts break down the state of the rivalry, opposing players each team would want, favorite past games and more.

item.title: Ohio State approves $100 million settlement for victims in school doctor sexual abuse case
item.description: The school previously reached six separate settlements totaling $61 million with 317 other victims.

item.title: How do Ohio State fans feel in 2026? Thoughts on Ryan Day, Michigan, CFP expansion and more
item.description: Ohio State fans always have high expectations. Here's what our survey revealed about the football mood in Columbus in 2026.

item.title: Submit your Michigan and Ohio State questions for our rivalry mailbag!
item.description: Buckeyes expert Cameron Teague Robinson and Wolverines expert Austin Meek are joining forces to answer your rivalry questions.

item.title: College football preseason top-25 rankings for 2026: Man vs. Machine
item.description: One originates from roster talent evaluation and intel, the other from a statistical projection model.

item.title: Ten college football recruiting storylines to watch as official visits heat up
item.description: Will Alabama keep its streak of top-five classes alive? Can Texas Tech hold onto Jalen Brewster? Where does Colton Nussmeier land?

item.title: Who are the biggest recruiting finds at every Power 4 school in the past decade?
item.description: Ladd McConkey, who won two national titles at Georgia, was ranked No. 1,131 in his class. Former LSU star Justin Jefferson was No. 2,174.

item.title: Top 25 college football rankings for 2026 season after spring: Indiana is back at No. 1
item.description: Which teams climbed and which ones fell after spring ball?

item.title: Submit a question to Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: This week I’m heading to my first-ever Women’s College World Series in Oklahoma City. Which means I’ll have a lot of time on planes to answer your college football questions. Leave ’em here. Please include your city.

item.title: Ohio State fans: How do you feel about the Buckeyes in 2026? Let us know in our survey
item.description: Give us your thoughts on the Buckeyes heading into 2026, plus College Football Playoff expansion and more.

item.title: Why Michigan-Ohio State should move to October if the Playoff expands to 24 teams
item.description: I love Michigan-Ohio State as is, but I worry the greatness of the rivalry will be wasted if played after a 24-team CFP is mostly set.

item.title: Ohio State is off to a strong recruiting start. Here are 5 questions dictating its finish
item.description: Ohio State has two five-star prospects committed, but we'll learn a lot more about the ceiling of the 2027 class over the next month.

item.title: College football's top 100 transfers: Which players will make the biggest impact in 2026?
item.description: Former Auburn wide receiver Cam Coleman, who will be Arch Manning's No. 1 target at Texas, headlines the list of top transfers.

item.title: Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: As we continue to stand watch over the 24-team CFP saga, I welcome your questions on all college football matters. Leave ’em here. Please include your city.

item.title: What we heard at Big Ten meetings: No push to mandate 10 Power 4 opponents amid CFP talks
item.description: Every SEC, ACC and Big 12 team will play 10 Power 4 opponents in 2026, but four Big Ten teams will only play nine.

item.title: What I expect from Ohio State's roster: 44 thoughts on 44 defensive players (and kickers)
item.description: Matt Patricia has seven NFL Draft picks to replace, but Ohio State's defense is loaded with talent again.

item.title: Michigan-Ohio State rivalry is enough reason to bag a 24-team College Football Playoff
item.description: Congrats, Big Ten commissioner Tony Petitti, you’ve found a way to make your most valuable piece of inventory as worthless as possible.

item.title: Who would have made a 24-team field in the College Football Playoff era? Try 80 different teams
item.description: Eighty teams would have made a 24-team CFP over the last 12 seasons. Here's what we learned from mocking 12 years of brackets.

item.title: Recruiting Report: 'Scare tactics,' QB carousel, USC's follow-up, Texas A&M's tear
item.description: Texas A&M's 2027 class already includes four five-star prospects, including the nation's top offensive lineman.

item.title: Big Ten, Tony Petitti all in on 24-team CFP: 'We feel strongly about it'
item.description: "Inside our league," the Big Ten commissioner said, "there is a deep commitment to 24 and the access."

item.title: What you need to know about Ohio State's 2026 roster: 44 thoughts on 44 offensive players
item.description: Ohio State has big expectations coming into this season. Here's a position-by-position breakdown of the Buckeyes' offensive roster.
